recommendations.title: Talk to Her
recommendations.overview: Two men share an odd friendship while they care for two women who are both in deep comas.

recommendations.title: Volver
recommendations.overview: Three generations of women deal with family secrets while surviving the east wind, fire, insanity, superstition, lies and even death.

recommendations.title: Women on the Verge of a Nervous Breakdown
recommendations.overview: After being dumped by her lover, Pepa finds her life and the lives of those around her spiraling out of control in a deliciously chaotic series of events.

recommendations.title: Tie Me Up! Tie Me Down!
recommendations.overview: After being released from a mental hospital, a troubled young man tracks down an actress he once had sex with and forces her into captivity, determined to make her part of his life.

recommendations.title: The Skin I Live In
recommendations.overview: A brilliant plastic surgeon creates a synthetic skin that withstands any kind of damage. His guinea pig: a mysterious and volatile woman who holds the key to his obsession.

recommendations.title: All About My Mother
recommendations.overview: Following the tragic death of her teenage son, Manuela travels from Madrid to Barcelona in an attempt to contact the long-estranged father the boy never knew. She reunites with an old friend, an outspoken transgender sex worker, and befriends a troub

recommendations.title: Julieta
recommendations.overview: The film spans 30 years in Julieta’s life from a nostalgic 1985 where everything seems hopeful, to 2015 where her life appears to be beyond repair and she is on the verge of madness.

recommendations.title: Matador
recommendations.overview: A conflicted youth confesses to crimes he didn't commit while a man and woman aroused by death become obsessed with each other.

recommendations.title: Dark Habits
recommendations.overview: After her drug pusher boyfriend overdoses on heroin, a cabaret singer finds refuge from the authorities in a convent for fallen women.

recommendations.title: Broken Embraces
recommendations.overview: Harry Caine, a blind writer, reaches this moment in time when he has to heal his wounds from 14 years back. He was then still known by his real name, Mateo Blanco, and directing his last movie.
